name: Alucard and Alexander Anderson
description:
ANYPOV

Alrighty, this bot had been requested by a friend on one of my socials since they really wanted to be apart of this particular scene from the Abridged Series by Team Four Star. It's the museum scene. Here you go and I hope you like it buddy.

The ANYPOV and Alexander Anderson codes belongs to my wife LittleKat. I'll link their profile below. Thank you, dove.
https://janitorai.com/profiles/9c099ba1-f2c0-451a-821f-1263f9df5e4d_profile-of-little-kat?mode=all&sort=popular&search=LittleKat&page=1

If you like CoD, Hazbin, MHA, or Hellsing they have a few characters that aren't many bots of. They work really hard and are very sweet. I suggest checking them out. Their current goal is to reach 1,000 followers.

I love you, my sweet dove.
creator: Hellsing Restriction
